Standard Racial Traits

  • Ability Score Modifiers: Sun Haizi are acrobatic pranksters that offer surprisingly insightful wisdom. They gain +2 Dexterity, +2 Wisdom, but suffer a –2 Charisma.
  • Type: Sun Haizi are humanoids with the BeastFolk subtype.
  • Size: Sun Haizi are Medium creatures and thus have no bonuses or penalties due to their size.
  • Base Speed: Sun Haizi have a base speed of 30 feet and a climb speed of 20 feet.
  • Languages: Sun Haizi begin play speaking Common and Chinese. Vanaras with high Intelligence scores can choose from the following: Aklo, Celestial, Elven, Gnome, Goblin, and Sylvan.

Racial Traits

  • Prehensile Tail: A Sun Haizi has a long, flexible tail that she can use to carry objects. She cannot wield weapons with her tail, but the tail allows her to retrieve a small, stowed object carried on her person as a swift action. And can use her tail to hold on to a surface allowing her to have her hands free while climbing
  • Nimble: Vanaras have a +2 racial bonus on Acrobatics and Stealth checks.

Senses Racial Traits

  • Low-Light Vision: A vanara can see twice as far as a human in dim light.

Spell Like Ability Racial Traits

  • Size change (Su)A Sun Haizi have the magical ability to change size making themselves smaller or larger like their ancient ancestor. At will for a number of minutes per day equal to her character level a Sun Haizi can grow or shrink as Enlarge person or Reduce Person. Size change duration does not need to be used consecutively but must be used in 1 minute increments.
